REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE IN SUPPORT OF DEFENDANTS OPPOSITION TO PLAINTIFFS MOTION FOR PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION (TRANSACTION ID # 57620522) FILED BY DEFENDANT SPECIALIZED LOAN SERVICING LLC

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, PLAINTIFF DAVID BRYAN'S MOTION FOR A PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION IS DENIED. MOVING PARTY FAILED TO SHOW MATERIAL VIOLATION OF CC 2923.6. SPECIFICALLY, NO EVIDENCE IS PROVIDED THAT A COMPLETE LOAN MODIFICATION APPLICATION WAS PENDING WHEN NOTICE OF DEFAULT OR NOTICE OF TRUSTEE SALE WERE RECORDED; AND NO EVIDENCE IS PROVIDED THAT TRUSTEE SALE WAS CONDUCTED. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK: M. OLOPERNES, NOT REPORTED

Notice Of Motion And Motion For A Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Aug-10-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Robert Paredes, Esq. of Bergman & Gutierrez, LLP, APPEARING THROUGH COURT CALL for David Bryan, Plaintiff and moving party.
Valerie J. Schratz, Esq. of Green & Hall, APPEARING THROUGH COURT CALL for Specialized Loan Servicing, LLC, Defendant and opposing party.

Arguments are heard from Plaintiff. Defendant submits to the tentative ruling.

Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF DAVID BRYAN'S Motion For A Preliminary Injunction is DENIED. Moving party failed to show material violation of CC 2923.6. Specifically, no evidence is provided that a complete loan modification application was pending when Notice of Default or Notice of Trustee Sale were recorded; and no evidence is provided that trustee sale was conducted. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not Reported, D501.
